title: Frequency
description: Generic frequency ranking schema used by multiple frequency files (newspaper corpus from KANJIDIC2, modern media corpus from JPDB, etc.). Each file lists entries ranked by frequency with 1 = most common.

corpus.description: Human-readable description of the corpus the frequencies are derived from (e.g., 'Newspaper corpus (KANJIDIC2)', 'JPDB modern media: light novels + visual novels + anime + drama').

kind.description: What kind of thing is being ranked.

text.description: The word, kanji, or reading being ranked.

reading.description: For word-frequency files, the kana reading used for disambiguation.

rank.description: Rank in the corpus. 1 = most common.

count.description: Raw occurrence count, if the upstream source provides it.
